I'm pursuing a B.Sc. in Cyber Security at the University of Applied Sciences Mannheim, with a focus on cryptography (i love post-quantum systems in particular) and offensive security in all its forms.

I work as a security analyst at ERNW in Heidelberg. Outside of that I train methodically through HackTheBox and OffSec Proving Grounds. The current goal: get sharper with boxes while keeping one foot in post-quantum cryptography research.
A lot of what I learn and build ends up documented here on the blog. Including the stuff that doesn't work on the first five attempts.
